channel.title: first post on aaron lightner
channel.description: Recent content in first post on aaron lightner

item.title: Hello, world!
item.description: First blog post ever Thanks for stopping by my academic weblog. This will be dedicated to reporting on new research, projects I’m involved in, and data analysis in R. I also plan to preview my own research as it progresses. As a social scientist, I will post discussions about anything that interests me as a researcher, or with interesting applications to my own fields (anthropology, cognitive science) or adjacent fields.
